meta.topic: イラン中国に裏切られる
meta.style: Fermi Lab chibi anime style, 2-3 head proportions, clean lines, soft shading, emoji-faced mob characters

scenes.asset: イラン中国に裏切られる/assets/scenes/scene_01.mp4
scenes.text: 先生、中国が{red:イラン}を裏切ったってマジっすか？
scenes.description: 少年がニュースを見て驚く冒頭シーン
scenes.prompt:
Fermi Lab chibi anime style, 2-3 head proportions, clean lines, soft shading, horizontal 16:9 landscape.

Scene: A chibi boy (teal hair, round glasses, white dinosaur hoodie) facing the viewer with a shocked expression, holding a tablet showing a news headline. Amy-sensei (silver/white long hair, blue eyes, red/maroon blazer) standing next to him with a serious expression. Chinese and Iranian flags crossed behind them, with a crack running through the middle. Dramatic red and dark blue lighting.

scenes.asset: イラン中国に裏切られる/assets/scenes/scene_02.mp4
scenes.text: {red:3月12日}、中国が公式に声明を出したの。イランの湾岸諸国への攻撃を{red:強く非難}する、直ちに停戦しろってね。
scenes.description: 中国外務省スポークスマンが記者会見で声明を出すシーン
scenes.prompt:
Fermi Lab chibi anime style, 2-3 head proportions, clean lines, soft shading, horizontal 16:9 landscape.

Scene: A press conference podium with a Chinese government seal. An emoji-faced mob spokesperson (😤 stern face, black suit) pointing at reporters. Behind the podium, a large screen showing 'CONDEMN' in red letters with an Iranian flag. Multiple emoji-faced mob reporters (📝😮) in the audience. Official blue and red government lighting. Chinese flags flanking the podium.

scenes.asset: イラン中国に裏切られる/assets/scenes/scene_03.png
scenes.text: えっ、中国とイランって{red:仲良かった}んじゃないっすか？
scenes.description: 中国とイランが握手していた過去のイメージ→ヒビが入る
scenes.prompt:
Fermi Lab chibi anime style, 2-3 head proportions, clean lines, soft shading, horizontal 16:9 landscape.

Scene: Two emoji-faced mob characters shaking hands — one wearing Chinese flag-themed clothing (red with stars), the other in Iranian flag colors (green/white/red). They are smiling (😊🤝😊) but the handshake area is cracking with visible fissures. Behind them, a large partnership document labeled '友好' is tearing apart. Warm colors fading to cold blue, symbolizing betrayal.

scenes.asset: イラン中国に裏切られる/assets/scenes/scene_04.png
scenes.text: 2021年に{red:25年間}の戦略的パートナーシップ協定を結んでるわ。総額{red:4000億ドル}、約{red:60兆円}の超大型契約よ。それを公の場で裏切ったの。
scenes.description: 巨大な契約書にサインする両国のリーダー、金額が浮かぶ
scenes.prompt:
Fermi Lab chibi anime style, 2-3 head proportions, clean lines, soft shading, horizontal 16:9 landscape.

Scene: A dramatic contract signing scene. A massive golden document in the center labeled '$400B / ¥60兆 / 25 YEARS'. Two emoji-faced mob leaders signing — one in Chinese attire, one in Iranian. But the Chinese leader's pen is making an 'X' through the contract instead of signing. Gold coins and dollar bills floating around. Dark dramatic lighting with gold highlights. A '2021' date stamp visible.

scenes.asset: イラン中国に裏切られる/assets/scenes/scene_05.png
scenes.text: {red:60兆円}の同盟を裏切るって何があったんすか！
scenes.description: 少年が60兆円の裏切りに衝撃を受ける
scenes.prompt:
Fermi Lab chibi anime style, 2-3 head proportions, clean lines, soft shading, horizontal 16:9 landscape.

Scene: The chibi boy (teal hair, round glasses, white dinosaur hoodie) facing the viewer with an extremely shocked, jaw-dropping expression. Behind him, giant red numbers '¥60兆' shattering like glass. Broken contract pieces flying around. Dramatic red impact lines radiating from the center. High-contrast dramatic lighting.

scenes.asset: イラン中国に裏切られる/assets/scenes/scene_06.png
scenes.text: ここが中国の{red:二枚舌}よ。おもてでは非難しておきながら、裏では{red:ワシントンポスト}が暴露したわ。3月上旬に{red:広東省}からイランへ{red:兵器原料}を積んだ船が出港してたの。
scenes.description: 二枚舌の構図：表で非難しながら裏で兵器輸送する中国
scenes.prompt:
Fermi Lab chibi anime style, 2-3 head proportions, clean lines, soft shading, horizontal 16:9 landscape.

Scene: Split composition showing Chinese hypocrisy. Top half (bright, official): An emoji-faced Chinese diplomat (😤) at a UN podium saying 'CONDEMN!' with microphones. Bottom half (dark, secretive): A cargo ship with Chinese flag sneaking through dark waters at night, loaded with military crates marked with weapons symbols. A newspaper headline 'Washington Post EXPOSED' overlaid. Sharp diagonal split between light and dark halves.

scenes.asset: イラン中国に裏切られる/assets/scenes/scene_07.png
scenes.text: {red:兵器}を送りながら非難ってヤバくないっすか！
scenes.description: モブ群衆が驚き呆れるリアクション
scenes.prompt:
Fermi Lab chibi anime style, 2-3 head proportions, clean lines, soft shading, horizontal 16:9 landscape.

Scene: A group of emoji-faced mob characters (😱😤🤯) reacting with shock and disbelief. Some covering their mouths, some pointing angrily. In the background, a split image: left side shows a formal condemnation speech, right side shows hidden weapons shipment. A large '!?' symbol in red. Dynamic reaction scene with multiple emotional expressions.

scenes.text: でも中国には切実な事情があるの。中国の石油備蓄はたった{red:100日}分。日本の{red:250日}と比べて半分以下よ。しかも原油の{red:3割}をイランに頼ってる。
scenes.description: 石油備蓄比較データパネル：中国100日 vs 日本250日 + イラン依存30%

scenes.asset: イラン中国に裏切られる/assets/scenes/scene_09.png
scenes.text: じゃあイランを怒らせたら{red:ヤバい}じゃないっすか！
scenes.description: 怒ったイランがホルムズ海峡を封鎖するイメージ
scenes.prompt:
Fermi Lab chibi anime style, 2-3 head proportions, clean lines, soft shading, horizontal 16:9 landscape.

Scene: An angry emoji-faced mob character in Iranian colors (🤬) slamming a giant gate shut across a narrow water strait (Hormuz). Oil tankers stuck on both sides. Chinese flag tankers especially highlighted among those blocked. Red warning lights flashing. Dramatic tense atmosphere with dark red and orange lighting.

scenes.asset: イラン中国に裏切られる/assets/scenes/scene_10.png
scenes.text: だからこそよ。{red:ホルムズ海峡}が封鎖されたら中国経済は{red:即死}。イランを支持したいけど、海峡を危険にする暴走は止めたい。石油のために同盟国すら裏切る、これが{red:国際政治の現実}よ。
scenes.description: エイミー先生が国際政治の冷酷さを説く核心シーン
scenes.prompt:
Fermi Lab chibi anime style, 2-3 head proportions, clean lines, soft shading, horizontal 16:9 landscape.

Scene: Amy-sensei (silver/white long hair, blue eyes, red/maroon blazer) in the center foreground facing the viewer with a grave, solemn expression, arms crossed. Behind her, a chess board where the pieces are oil barrels, flags (China, Iran, USA), and tanker ships. A Chinese piece is pushing an Iranian piece off the board. Dark, dramatic lighting with red and gold chess-themed atmosphere. The word '現実' faintly visible in the background.

scenes.asset: イラン中国に裏切られる/assets/scenes/scene_11.png
scenes.text: 大国って怖いっす！こういう裏側を知りたいかたは、チャンネル登録して続きを待ちなさい。
scenes.description: CTA — 少年とエイミー先生がチャンネル登録を呼びかけ
scenes.prompt:
Fermi Lab chibi anime style, 2-3 head proportions, clean lines, soft shading, horizontal 16:9 landscape.

Scene: A cheerful ending scene. The boy (teal hair, round glasses, white dinosaur hoodie) in the center facing the viewer with a slightly nervous but smiling expression, waving. Amy-sensei (silver hair, red blazer) next to him facing the viewer with a confident, warm smile. A large red SUBSCRIBE button and bell notification icon. Geopolitical map faintly in the background. Bright warm yellow/orange background with confetti.
